productDisplayName: Maxima Ssteele Men White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel square case Dial style: White round dial with black and white hands Strap style: Black rubber strap with stripe patterns and a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 and 6 hour mark, date aperture on the 3 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
